name: Exact-Change Candy Cascade
description: Create a solver-audited exact score with four sequential adjacent match-three swaps and deterministic multi-wave cascades.
natural_language: Make exactly the posted score in four valid adjacent swaps. Cascades multiply; never move the black licorice.

metadata.notes: A real adjacent-swap match-three engine enumerates four-move routes over changing boards, with simultaneous removals, deterministic gravity/refill, wave multipliers, an exact target, and terminal licorice contact.
